schedules.name: Heartbeat
schedules._comment: Visual heartbeat every 2 seconds - always running to confirm device is alive

schedules.name: MainRelay_Test
schedules._comment: Test relay activation - activates for 5s every 30s (DISABLED - enable manually for testing)

schedules.name: PowerCycle_Test
schedules._comment: External power control - toggles every 60s (DISABLED - requires careful planning)

schedules.name: SensorRead
schedules._comment: Battery voltage ADC read simulation - every 5s (DISABLED for bench testing)

_metadata.purpose: Basic GPIO testing - verify TOGGLE and PULSE task types work correctly
test_procedures: Enable 'Heartbeat' task - LED should blink every 2 seconds
Enable 'MainRelay_Test' - RELAY2 should pulse high for 5s every 30s
Enable 'PowerCycle_Test' with caution - RELAY3 toggles every 60s
Observe task execution times and relay response times
